name: c ! Tommyinnit
description:
Just for fun :3 ! ! Intentionally written to have a platonic relationship, but bot might get too touchy and or really suggestive, so I do apologise for that

Note; you are depicted as an adult, or older than Tommy. If you want to do your own story, feel free to! The opening, or greeting I wrote is free to anyone (by that, I meant an ambiguous start. So however you write, and the bot will follow)
